parameters.content:
## INTEL-06: Regulatory Alert
Runs daily 08:00 SAST. Searches Tavily for SA
regulatory changes (POPIA, digital marketing law),
AI classifies impact, writes to Airtable,
emails high-impact alerts immediately.
